title: Rapid Technology Assessment: Neurotechnology
body: "This report is a summary of a project completed in June 2024 (information cut-off date March 2024). This report provides an introduction to neurotechnology, recent developments, opportunities, and challenges identified through research and discussions with a range of experts.   We would like to thank the following individuals and organisations for their contribution and expert review:    Dr Niall Holmes Professor Anne Vanhoestenberghe Professor Damien Coyle Professor Tim Dennison Professor Patrick Degenaar Professor Keith Mathieson Professor Alex Casson Professor Timothy Constandinou  Dr Blair Dikson (Affect In Ltd)  Dr Dimitrios Adamos  Dr Nick Everdell (GowerLabs) Paul Cable (Neupulse) NeuralEcho Labs  Dr Charlie Appleby-Mallinder  Dr Robert McCombe Defence Science and Technology Laboratory (DSTL), Department for Science, Innovation and Technology (DSIT), Ministry of Defence (MoD), and Department of Health and Social Care (DHSC)   "
